message:
test: add 8 differential fixtures + 5 VT unit tests for NEL/DECALN/UTF-8/wide chars (bd-1ivrz)

- Fix screen_text() to skip wide char continuation cells for consistent snapshots
- Add differential fixtures: nel_basic, nel_at_bottom_scrolls, decaln_fills_screen,
  decaln_then_overwrite, utf8_two_byte, utf8_three_byte_cjk, wide_char_two_cells,
  wide_char_wrap_at_last_col
- Add VT unit tests: utf8_basic_multibyte, wide_char_basic,
  wide_char_wraps_at_last_column, narrow_overwrites_wide_lead,
  narrow_overwrites_wide_continuation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
